title: Leucophae pumila
taxonomy: Leucophae pumila is classified within the family Asteraceae, which consists of flowering plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. The genus Leucophae is a group of small-flowered plants native to the Americas. Pumila is the species epithet, indicating that this particular plant is small in stature. Leucophae pumila is further classified within the tribe Heliantheae, which comprises a diverse range of flowering plants. The specific classification of Leucophae pumila is a subject of ongoing research in the field of botany.
